RIEMANN XI CURVATURE INVARIANT
================================================================================
dps                 : 150
Xi(1/2)             : (0.49712077818831410991277373968539771980729360955770518593323423399849552904554349 + 0.0j)
Xi''(1/2)           : (0.022971944315145437535249876497632170264593013837589063499144622165183631858892554 + 0.0j)

N_Xi = 2pi/K0       : 135.97029169825942439274616929091323401123716902969538664653640745369294497954661
